steps.observed: FreqUI welcome page loaded with Freqtrade UI branding, navigation bar, and Login button

steps.expected: Login form with server URL, username, password fields
steps.observed: Login modal appeared with Bot Name, API Url (pre-populated with http://localhost:8020), Username, and Password fields, plus Submit/Cancel/Reset buttons

steps.expected: FreqUI page loads without requiring any client-side installation
steps.observed: FreqUI loaded correctly as a web application served from the server, no client-side installation required

steps.action: Click Login button on FreqUI homepage
steps.observed: Login modal with Bot Name, API Url, Username, Password fields

steps.action: Fill username 'admin' and password 'admin', click Submit

steps.expected: Dashboard shows connected state, no error banners
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'A-Share Quant Dashboard Online' in top-right, 'Available bots' section with 'ftbot.0' and green indicator, navigation shows logged-in state (Chart, Logs, Backtest, Pairlist Config links)

evidence.consoleErrors: Request failed with status code 404 (expected — unimplemented endpoints return 404 as designed, not 500)

steps.expected: FreqUI loads correctly, not a 404 page
steps.observed: FreqUI backtesting page loaded with Strategy selector, Backtesting parameters, date pickers, Start/Stop/Reset buttons, and tabs (Load Results, Run backtest, Analyze result, Visualize summary, Visualize result)

steps.expected: Server serves index.html for non-API routes
steps.observed: Server correctly served index.html, FreqUI SPA handled /backtest route client-side, page fully functional with 'A-Share Quant Dashboard Online' connected state

evidence.consoleErrors: Request failed with status code 404 x2 (expected — FreqUI polling unimplemented endpoints, returns 404 not 500 as designed)
evidence.network: GET http://localhost:8020/backtest -> 200 (served index.html via SPA fallback)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-UI-001: FreqUI login page loads with all required fields. VAL-CROSS-002: FreqUI accessible from browser without client installation. VAL-UI-002: Login with admin/admin succeeds, dashboard shows connected state. VAL-CROSS-004: Deep link /backtest loads FreqUI backtest page via SPA routing.
